Description: Complete Admin Test Suite - All User, Property, Review, and Filter Management Tests
Test Case: Admin Access Required - Verifies that only admin users can access the Users Management page
Test Case: View Users Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Users Management page
Test Case: Edit User with Valid Data - Verifies that admin can edit an existing user with valid data
Test Case: Edit User with Empty Name - Verifies validation for empty user name
Test Case: Change User Role - Verifies that admin can change a user's role
Test Case: Deactivate User - Verifies that admin can deactivate a user with confirmation
Test Case: Cancel Deactivate User - Verifies that canceling deactivation keeps the user active
Test Case: Reactivate User - Verifies that admin can reactivate an inactive user
Test Case: Switch Between Active and Inactive Tabs - Verifies tab switching functionality
Test Case: Cancel Edit User - Verifies that canceling edit doesn't save changes
Test Case: Close Modal with X Button - Verifies that the X button closes the modal without saving
Test Case: View Properties Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Properties Management page
Test Case: Edit Property with Valid Data - Verifies that admin can edit an existing property
Test Case: Edit Property with Empty Title - Verifies validation for empty property title
Test Case: Change Property Status - Verifies that admin can change a property's status
Test Case: Delete Property - Verifies that admin can delete a property with confirmation
Verify that admin can cancel property deletion when prompted
Verify that admin can cancel property edit using Cancel button
Verify that admin can close property edit modal using X button
Verify that admin can access and view the Reviews Management page
Verify that admin can delete a review with confirmation
Verify that admin can cancel review deletion when prompted
Test Case: View Filters Management Page - Verifies that admin can access and view the Filters Management page with proper UI elements
Test Case: Create Filter with Valid Data - Verifies that admin can create a new filter with valid data
Test Case: Create Filter with Empty Name (Negative) - Verifies that form validation prevents creating filter without name
Test Case: Edit Existing Filter - Verifies that admin can edit an existing filter and changes are saved
Test Case: Delete Filter - Verifies that admin can delete a filter with confirmation
Test Case: Cancel Delete Filter - Verifies that canceling deletion keeps the filter
Test Case: Create Inactive Filter - Verifies that a filter can be created with inactive status
Test Case: Toggle Filter Status - Verifies that filter status can be toggled between Active and Inactive
Test Case: Cancel Add Filter Modal - Verifies that canceling the add modal doesn't create a filter
Test Case: Close Modal with X Button - Verifies that the X button closes the modal without creating a filter
